name: hud-speed-onto-radial
_note: The reported real-world case: in the committed Game/HUD, child the speed counter (elements[0]/children[15], the Danger-coloured value) onto the big 220x220 radial speed dial (elements[0]/children[14]). Both are leaves under the safearea and the radial is a 'progress' (non-container), so the drag free-moves the counter over the dial but does NOT child it. The delta drags the counter down-left toward the dial centre; tune it to your device size if needed. The fix for 'number centred in the ring' is to wrap the dial + counter + KM/H text in an overlay (see child-leaf-into-overlay.json).
